name: IndianNationType

members.name: IndianNationType
members.javadoc: /** * Create a new native nation type. * * @param id The object identifier. * @param specification The Specification to refer to. */

tags.name: id
tags.assertion: assert receiverObjectID == null || receiverObjectID instanceof java.lang.String;
tags.description: The object identifier must be a String

tags.name: specification
tags.assertion: assert receiverObjectID == null || receiverObjectID instanceof com.example.Specification;
tags.description: The Specification to refer to must be an instance of Specification

members.name: isEuropean
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Is this a European nation type?
 *
 * @return False.
 */

members.name: isIndian
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Is this a native nation type?
 *
 * @return True.
 */

members.name: isREF
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Is this a REF nation type?
 *
 * @return False.
 */

members.name: getSettlementTypeKey
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Get a message id for the general type of settlements of this nation.
 *
 * @param plural Choose the plural form or not.
 * @return A suitable message id.
 */

tags.name: plural
tags.content: Choose the plural form or not.

members.name: getRegionNames
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Gets the list of regions in which this tribe may settle.
 *
 * @return A list of regions identifiers.
 */

members.name: getSkills
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Gets a list of this Nation's skills.
 *
 * @return A list of national skills.
 */

members.name: generateSkillsForTile
members.javadoc: /** * Generates choices for skill that could be taught from a settlement on * a given Tile. * * @param tile The Tile where the settlement will be located. * @return A random choice set of skills. */

tags.name: tile
tags.content: The Tile where the settlement will be located.
